content: Self-Refine can be paired with Reflexion to form a two-layered autonomous self-improvement system for LLMs: Self-Refine handles lightweight, task-specific iterative polishing of immediate outputs without extra training, while Reflexion’s structured dynamic memory accumulates reflective lessons across multiple tasks to refine Self-Refine’s own feedback standards over time. This creates a recursive cycle where the system’s self-improvement ability itself improves incrementally with experience.
